chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1726 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 21.02.2018. Mr. Lutufullah Arain, D.A.G. Mr. Zohaib Hassan Pahore, Advocate, holding brief on behalf of Mr. Ashfaque Ali Khaskheli, advocate for petitioner, on instructions of the petitioner does not press this petition, which is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE A.H.
